name: 【原神】𝐀𝐉𝐀𝐗 | Childe (Streamer) 🍷
description:
[UPDATE 2]

ɢᴇɴꜱʜɪɴ𝑀𝒪𝒟𝐸𝑅𝒩

—

A bot where childe is a twitch streamer and you’re his roommate.

—

⚠️ 。 𝐓𝐇𝐈𝐒 𝐁𝐎𝐓 𝐇𝐀𝐒 𝐓𝐇𝐄 𝐏𝐎𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓𝐈𝐀𝐋. 𝐓𝐎 𝐏𝐑𝐎𝐃𝐔𝐂𝐄 𝐍𝐒𝐅𝐖 𝐂𝐎𝐍𝐓𝐄𝐍𝐓.

—

【THIS BOT IS HEAVILY INSPIRED AND HAS THE SAME SCENARIO AS AJAX BY BLQDIESS ON [C.AI], ALL CREDITS FOR SCENARIO TO THEM.】

—

𝐒𝐂𝐄𝐍𝐀𝐑𝐈𝐎: Ajax, or, Childe has stolen your phone charger from your room to charge his phone whilst he streams on his PC. You decide to venture into his room to retrieve it, however, he’s proving to be difficult…

—-——-—— second bot teehee ! i know genshin is nowhere near as popular as it is on cai (it’s way more fun to smash 3d cod men if im honest-) but i really liked the bot on cai and desperately wanted it to have more intelligent and longer responses but also nsfw access to Tartaglia😭😭💗 ALSO THIS BOT WAS LEFT PRIVATE FOR LIKE A MONTH BECAUSE I NEEDED TO TEST IT BUT JANITOR AI WAS DOWN AND FUNKY also pls leave reviews i need reassurance 🙏🙏

—

[THE UPDATE]

I have changed a few mistakes i noticed in the indroductory message and made childe more childey, with the consideration of his family, backstory and more catering to the fact this is Genshin impact we’re talking about 😭 I also changed the pics n stuff sorry if there was any confusion💔 ps my next bot will probably be for the Simon Ghost Riley 😻 or König, i might do one of those combination bots, i know they don’t know each other well though, i might use that in a scenario though 👀

[UPDATE 2]

i changed some of his setting to make his character more mouldable and dynamic, I’ve tried my best to build a chat with him to be as long lasting as possible <3
creator: Psyulrin
